title: Model Context Protocol
description: MCP client support — transports, server primitives, client features, and configuration

features.title: stdio transport
features.description: Connect to MCP servers via local processes using stdin/stdout

features.title: SSE transport
features.description: Connect to MCP servers via Server-Sent Events over HTTP

features.title: Streamable HTTP transport
features.description: Connect to MCP servers via the newer streamable HTTP transport

features.title: Tool discovery & execution
features.description: Discover and invoke tools exposed by MCP servers

features.title: Resource support
features.description: Read structured data and context exposed by MCP servers as resources

features.title: Prompt template support
features.description: Use templated messages and workflows provided by MCP servers

features.title: Sampling
features.description: Allow MCP servers to request LLM completions through the client

features.title: Roots support
features.description: Expose filesystem or URI boundaries to MCP servers

features.title: Elicitation
features.description: Allow MCP servers to request additional input from the user mid-operation

features.title: OAuth authentication
features.description: OAuth 2.0 authentication for connecting to remote MCP servers

features.title: Project-level MCP config
features.description: Configure MCP servers per-project, shareable via version control

features.title: User-level MCP config
features.description: Configure MCP servers globally for the current user across all projects
